build.buildCommand: pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install python-dotenv && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py migrate extractor --noinput && python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; import os; User = get_user_model(); username = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_USERNAME', 'qa_adwin'); email = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL', 'eehernandez@buroidentidad.com'); password = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD'); if password and not User.objects.filter(username=username).exists(): User.objects.create_superuser(username, email, password); print('✅ Superusuario creado')" && gunicorn excel_extractor.wsgi --log-level debug
